blended.narrative: Le Massif is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.1 inches of dry powder expected. Snow levels around 1,791 ft. Looking ahead, 17 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Saturday: 2.7" of snow, highs of 22°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
